title: Add AWS Terraform resources for MSK and DocumentDB
description: Provision the missing AWS-managed messaging and database resources so the AWS deployment is not dependent on local placeholders.
acceptanceCriteria: Terraform includes managed Kafka and MongoDB-compatible resources for AWS
Service configuration points at the managed AWS resources instead of local Floci placeholders
The implementation is documented for future follow-up
notes: The researcher findings indicate that MongoDB and Kafka are still placeholder-based in the AWS path.
This work should be implemented in the AWS feature branch and later compared to the Azure pattern.
